response.justification: Despite a strong overall software engineering background, the candidate lacks demonstrated professional C++ experience on Windows and has no evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure — both mandatory requirements for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to academic/thesis work and outdated NI LabWindows projects, with no recent or relevant financial systems development.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record in DevOps, CI/CD, and testing practices
Active open-source contributor with technical communication skills
concerns: No professional C++ on Windows in last 10+ years; only academic/legacy use
Zero evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or banking domain experience
Primary modern stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang — not aligned with role requirements
